tools.name: sandbox_exec
tools.title: Sandbox Exec
tools.description: Run a bounded command inside a nested bubblewrap sandbox. Stdin can be supplied. Network is disabled by default. Output is truncated to configured caps.

command.description: Shell command to execute inside the sandbox via /bin/sh -lc.

stdin.description: Optional standard input to feed to the command.

timeoutMs.description: Maximum runtime in milliseconds. Capped server-side.

env.description: Optional environment overrides. Only allowlisted keys are forwarded; values are validated.
